name: Question
about: Ask a question about the project
title: "[QUESTION] "
labels: "question"
assignees: ""
---

## Question

Please ask your question here. Be as specific as possible.

## Context

Provide any relevant context that might help us understand your question better.

## What I've tried

Describe what you've already tried or researched:

- [ ] I've read the README
- [ ] I've searched existing issues
- [ ] I've looked at the documentation
- [ ] I've searched online

## Expected Answer

What kind of answer are you looking for? (e.g., code example, explanation, tutorial link)

## Additional Information

Any additional information that might be helpful.

---

**Note**: For general programming questions not specific to this project, consider asking on [Stack Overflow](https://stackoverflow.com/) or other appropriate forums.
